name: Soft Molasses Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar, molasses, and vegetable shortening at medium speed until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition until creamy.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, salt, and dry sugar substitute.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, stirring until combined.
5. Stir in the coffee and lemon juice.
6. Drop dough by 1 1/2 tablespoons onto ungreased cookie sheets sprayed with pan spray or lined with aluminum foil.
7. Bake at 375°F for 12 to 14 minutes, or until firm. Remove from oven and cool on a wire rack.
